hero.eyebrow: Nutrition first fitness for men who want clarity, not pressure.
hero.subheading: Cimientos helps you simplify nutrition, stay consistent, and create a practical foundation for muscle gain, fat loss, and real self-confidence. No confusing plans. No extreme tracking. Just a clear path forward.

footer.copy: A simple fitness foundation system for men who want to build a better body and a more confident life without the overwhelm.

about.heading: Why traditional fitness apps make you quit.
about.subheading: You're not failing because you're lazy. You're failing because the tools and advice weren't designed for someone starting where you are.
about.badge: Trusted by our early users who started their fitness journey from scratch

item-1.description: Scanning barcodes for every single lettuce leaf breeds mental stress and deep anxiety.

item-2.description: Relentless six-pack ads make normal progress feel worthless.

item-3.description: Missing one day triggers alerts that himiliate you into complete paralysis.

item-4.description: Spending 3 hours researching perfect routines without ever lifting a single weight.

item-1.intro: Meals are measured by grams, and estimates from food packages are fine. Each meal is weighed once and saved as a reusable recipe for easy tracking and repeat use.

item-2.description: Designed for introverted or timid guys looking to build confidence and strength from scratch.

item-3.description: A missed day isn't a failure, it's just a normal human break. The tracking recalculates automatically.

item-4.description: Your calorie requirements evolve naturally. Learn how to adjust them based on your own body's feedback with our simple step-by-step guidance.
